### Key Observations

- **ONE-739 (AIQ/ThoughtSpot):** Minimal sprint activity -- only 3 stories completed across 88 total (3.4%). Work started in sprint 26.04 and remains in early stages. One recurring bug tracked across multiple sprints.
- **ONE-1466 (EDW Enhancement):** Consistent 100% sprint completion from 26.01 through 26.09, with a slight dip in 26.10 (88.9%) and 26.11 (40.0%). Currently at 44.2% overall completion (42/95 stories). Very low bug rate (1 bug total).
- **ONE-1543 (Finance Reporting):** Highest velocity and volume -- ramped from 12 stories/sprint to 44 stories/sprint by 26.08. Currently at 63.1% overall completion (123/195). Bug rate increasing in recent sprints (68.4% of 26.11 stories are bugs), suggesting the project has entered a stabilization/defect-fix phase.
